message:
fix(deploy): remove edge function causing react/jsx-runtime error

- Delete api/og.tsx edge function (unsupported modules: react/jsx-runtime)
- Update vercel.json to remove db build step (use pre-built .gz)
- Add Vite plugin to remove raw phage.db from dist output
- Update .vercelignore to exclude raw db files

Static OG images (og-image.png, twitter-image.png) are used instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,9 +18,9 @@ dist/
 packages/wasm-compute/target/
 packages/tui/
 
-# Database files (exclude root, but keep packages/web/public/phage.db for deployment)
-/phage.db
-!packages/web/public/phage.db
+# Database files (only .gz needed for deployment, raw db built locally)
+*.db
+!packages/web/public/phage.db.gz
 
 # Documentation (not needed for deploy)
 *.md
@@ -54,3 +54,6 @@ phage_illustrations/

 .vscode/
 .idea/
+
+# Backup files
+*.bak
